name: siperb-web-phone
description: This project show how to Provision a Siperb Device and load Browser Phone, SIP.js JsSIP.js or your own custom Web-based SIP client.

scripts.start: npm run build && npm run cert && npm run serve -- -o test-index.html
scripts.start:sipjs: npm run build && npm run cert && npm run serve -- -o test-SIPJS.html
scripts.start:jssip: npm run build && npm run cert && npm run serve -- -o test-JSSIP.html
scripts.start:phone: npm run build && npm run cert && npm run serve -- -o test-Browser-Phone.html
scripts.start:asterisk: npm run build && npm run cert && npm run serve -- -o test-Asterisk-WebRTC.html
